content:
## Requirements

### R1: Domain Sub-Traits
- IssueSyncAdapter: push_issue, pull_issue
- SpecSyncAdapter: push_spec
- CodeSyncAdapter: pull_code_index
- ChangeSyncAdapter: push_change

### R2: SyncResult
SyncResult { external_id, external_url, status: Synced|Failed|Skipped }

### R3: Platform Adapters
- GitLabSyncAdapter: implements Issue + Code + Change
- GitHubSyncAdapter: implements Issue + Code + Change
- JiraSyncAdapter: stub (Issue only)
- ConfluenceSyncAdapter: stub (Spec only)
- GDocsSyncAdapter: stub (Spec only)
